title: OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7895596
body: " OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7895596 OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7895596 Publication notice   On 14 November 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/7895596 under regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows for the continuation of business operations with the Lukoil Bulgaria Entities. "
